If oil prices climb you’ll see TACOs. 

High IV, lots of round trips.

At this point just trying to look strong and make it look like a win... https://t.co/m3pksxs777

The drones do not have the reach. 

This is all about psychological warfare.

Iran is on a https://t.co/YjxyECQihV

tweets.author: TheShortBear
tweets.text:
This starts as an Oil issue but it turns into a investment flows crisis if drags on. 

The damage of Oil itself is secondary.

tweets.author: TheShortBear
tweets.text:
Not even joking when I say one quick read through the short version of the art of war... 100 pages...

Could have foreseen 90% of this and response. 

The war might not have been preventable (and even that), but the response was 100% predictable. Paying billions for it now.

tweets.author: TheShortBear
tweets.text:

Why would the FBI tell us that and not act like it does.

Gives reasons to rally the people against Iran as we remain stuck with no exit in place.

Expecting more and more of these headlines
